subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! In this divine century and heavenly assemblage women have been raised up who, like [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعله بنار محبت الله در این قرن الهی و حشر رحمانی نساای مبعوث شدند که چون
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
